---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for HES
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Which Component?

- [ ] SKILL.md (orchestrator)
- [ ] Skill file (skills/XX-name.md)
- [ ] Hook script (scripts/hooks/)
- [ ] CI/CD (GitHub Actions)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] New agent (v4.0 roadmap)
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## How This Would Be Used

Describe how you or others would use this feature in practice.

## HES Phase

Which HES phase does this relate to?

- [ ] ZERO (bootstrap)
- [ ] DISCOVERY
- [ ] SPEC
- [ ] DESIGN
- [ ] DATA
- [ ] RED (tests)
- [ ] GREEN (implementation)
- [ ] SECURITY
- [ ] REVIEW
- [ ] DONE
- [ ] SYSTEM (cross-cutting)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
